final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotional campaign.

Style/medium: needs a layered typographic aesthetic with artistic lettering — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 aspect ratio, must include layered/stacked typography arrangement, must include products or main subjects partially overlapping/obscuring some text elements
Subject: must include products or main promotional subjects as focal elements
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a promotional campaign atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include artistic lettering with stacked/layered typography
Constraints: must maintain visual complexity without appearing cluttered, must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio
Avoid: must avoid visual chaos despite complexity
